zotero.abstractNote: Foundation models are typically trained on a single modality (e.g., text or images). Stitching these models together to create multimodal systems usually requires extensive training or fine-tuning. We propose a method for modality stitching that is almost free, requiring minimal computational resources and no additional training of the foundation models themselves. Our approach leverages the latent space alignment of pre-trained models to enable cross-modal tasks with high efficiency.
zotero.proceedingsTitle: Proceedings of the 2025 Conference on Empirical Methods in Natural Language Processing
